mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_report (user_id, type, period, period_start, period_end, title, content_markdown, diary_count, model) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{period}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{title}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{diaryCount}, #{model})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND report_id = #{reportId}
